## Checklist

- [ ] `node bin/install.js --local` runs clean
- [ ] `src/commands/help.md` updated (if new command)
- [ ] Help command count matches `ls src/commands/*.md | wc -l`
- [ ] `HISTORY.md` updated with a short entry
- [ ] No hardcoded `~/.claude/` paths (installer handles path replacement)
- [ ] No secrets, customer names, or internal references in content
